name: Google Maps MCP Server
what_it_does: Google Maps MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Google Maps APIs — searching for places, geocoding addresses, getting directions and route information, retrieving business details, and integrating location data into agent-driven workflows requiring geographic context.
use_cases: Searching for nearby places and businesses from location-aware agents
Geocoding addresses to coordinates from data processing agents
Getting directions and travel time estimates from travel planning agents
Retrieving business hours and contact info from research agents
Calculating distances between locations from logistics agents
Finding points of interest for itinerary planning from travel agents
not_for: Teams needing free map data (use OpenStreetMap/Nominatim instead)
High-volume geocoding (Google Maps API has per-request costs beyond free tier)
Map rendering and visualization (this is data-only, no tiles)
best_when: An agent needs reliable place search, geocoding, or directions data — Google Maps offers the most comprehensive POI coverage globally.
avoid_when: You need free tier with no usage limits — use OpenStreetMap-based alternatives.

auth.notes: Google Maps API key required. Enable specific APIs (Places, Geocoding, Directions) in Google Cloud Console. Billing account required even for free tier.

pricing.free_tier_limits: $200/month free credit (~40,000 geocoding requests or ~28,000 place searches)
pricing.notes: Google Maps APIs require billing account. $200/month free credit is generous for moderate use. Community MCP server is free.

performance.rate_limits: Google Maps: 50 requests/second per API; monthly quota limits

known_agent_gotchas: Billing account required even for free tier — credit card mandatory
Multiple Google Maps APIs needed (Places, Geocoding, Directions) — enable each separately
API key must be restricted to specific APIs and IPs for security
Community MCP — not official Google; wraps multiple Maps APIs
Place IDs change occasionally — don't cache them long-term
Request costs can accumulate quickly in high-usage agent loops
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Restrict API key by API and IP. Google Cloud IAM available. Community MCP. Monitor usage to prevent unexpected billing.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS only. Restrict API key. Monitor billing. Community MCP.
